所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • com.easylive.admin,
  • com.easylive.admin.controller,
  • com.easylive.admin.interceptor

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.easylive.admin.controller.ABaseController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.AccountController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.CategoryController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.FileController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.IndexController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.InteractController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.SettingController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.UserController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.VideoController
      • com.easylive.admin.controller.VideoInfoController
    • com.easylive.admin.interceptor.AppInterceptor (implements org.springframework.web.servlet.HandlerInterceptor)
    • com.easylive.admin.EasyliveAdminRunApplication
    • com.easylive.admin.interceptor.WebAppConfigurer (implements org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer)
